commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 06 Jul

NYSE decisively leads with the lowest ILLIQ score (0.0016) and tightest AR spread (0.4810%), reflecting superior price discovery and minimal market impact. Conversely, London Stock Exchange significantly lags at rank six, displaying substantially elevated illiquidity (0.1421) and widest AR spread (0.8498%), suggesting material execution costs. Notably, Nasdaq 100 shows the highest Roll spread (1.7494%) despite strong overall ranking, indicating idiosyncratic microstructure dynamics that warrant investigation.
